mapper.select: select id, subject_code, subject_name, subject_type, sort, deleted, create_time, update_time from tb_subject where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_subject(subject_code, subject_name, subject_type, sort, deleted, create_time, update_time) values (#{subjectCode}, #{subjectName}, #{subjectType}, #{sort}, #{deleted}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into tb_subject(subject_code, subject_name, subject_type, sort, deleted, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.subjectCode}, #{entity.subjectName}, #{entity.subjectType}, #{entity.sort}, #{entity.deleted}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into tb_subject(subject_code, subject_name, subject_type, sort, deleted, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.subjectCode}, #{entity.subjectName}, #{entity.subjectType}, #{entity.sort}, #{entity.deleted}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update subject_code = values(subject_code), subject_name = values(subject_name), subject_type = values(subject_type), sort = values(sort), deleted = values(deleted), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update:
update tb_subject
subject_code = #{subjectCode},
subject_name = #{subjectName},
subject_type = #{subjectType},
sort = #{sort},
deleted = #{deleted},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
